problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
